level.description:
Level of the block where the staking update happened.  
**[sortable]**

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the block where the staking update happened.

cycle.description: For `unstake`, `restake`, `finalize` and `slash_unstaked` update types it's freezer cycle, otherwise it's cycle of the block.

pseudotokens.description: Amount of staking pseudotokens minted or burnt.

roundingError.description: Protocol rounding error, appearing after slashing.

autostakingOpId.description:
Id of the operation, caused the staking update.
If all `..OpId` fields are null, then the staking update was produced by the protocol migration.

stakingOpId.description:
Id of the operation, caused the staking update.
If all `..OpId` fields are null, then the staking update was produced by the protocol migration.

delegationOpId.description:
Id of the operation, caused the staking update.
If all `..OpId` fields are null, then the staking update was produced by the protocol migration.

doubleBakingOpId.description:
Id of the operation, caused the staking update.
If all `..OpId` fields are null, then the staking update was produced by the protocol migration.

doubleConsensusOpId.description:
Id of the operation, caused the staking update.
If all `..OpId` fields are null, then the staking update was produced by the protocol migration.
